name: Xiaomon

signature_move.name: Baby Bubble
signature_move.description: Releases a high-frequency wave that is an effective charm against evil.

description: A four-legged Baby Digimon that evolved from Paomon . It is said that Digimon that were created artificially basically only evolve up to their Child-level, and the most often seen artificial Digimon is this Xiaomon. It forms attachments with people enormously easily, and among Digimon it is the easiest to train. Its Special Move, " Tummo ", releases a high-frequency wave that is an effective charm against evil.
